Maleficent: Mistress of Evil (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $113,929,605Details
International Box Office $375,251,752
Worldwide Box Office $489,181,357
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,244,962
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $15,110,335
Total $23,355,297
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The film continues to explore the complex relationship between the horned fairy and the soon to be Queen as they form new alliances and face new adversaries in their struggle to protect the moors and the magical creatures that reside within.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$36,948,713 (32.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.08 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:23.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$185,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,790 opening theaters/3,820 max. theaters, 5.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $148,753,445

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 18th, 2019 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: October 17th, 2019 (Wide) (New Zealand)
October 17th, 2019 (Wide) (China)
October 17th, 2019 (Wide), released as Maleficent - Signora del male (Italy)
October 18th, 2019 (Wide), released as ZLOHOTNICA: VLADARICA ZLA (Slovenia)
October 18th, 2019 (Wide) (Argentina)
Video Release: December 31st, 2019 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for intense sequences of fantasy action/violence and brief scary images.
(Rating bulletin 2597 (Cert #52342), 9/25/2019)
Running Time: 118 minutes
Franchise: Maleficent
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Bigotry, Dysfunctional Family, Fairies, Fairy Godmother, Prince/Princess, Romance, Royalty, War
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Pictures, Roth Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
